title: chrysanthemum leucanthemum var. lanceolatum
intro: Chrysanthemum leucanthemum var. lanceolatum is a variation of the oxeye daisy plant, scientifically known for its daisy-like flowers and lance-shaped leaves. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Chrysanthemum leucanthemum var. lanceolatum include reducing fever and alleviating symptoms of respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds. In herbal preparations, this plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
